name: Chocolate Marzipan Slices (Mandulas Szalami)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt and cool the chocolate.
2. Mix the almond paste, melted chocolate, and chopped almonds thoroughly on a surface sprinkled with powdered sugar (1-2 tablespoons).
3. Knead until you have a uniform color and consistency.
4. Shape into a roll about 6 inches long.
5. Roll in powdered sugar.
6. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 12 hours.
7. Cut the roll into 1/4-inch slices.
Makes about 24 candies
